nameMeanings.name: Perkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Parkinson  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Parkinson
meanings: English (mainly northern): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Parkin + -son. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Ann Perkinson was born in 1417, in Durham, England, her father, Alexander Parkinson, was 50 and her mother, Betty Bowers, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with John Killinghall Jr., Esq.. She died in 1471, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Ann Perkinson est née en 1417, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Parkinson, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Betty Bowers, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec John Killinghall Jr., Esq.. Elle est décédée en 1471, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Ann Perkinson 1417 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Parkinson 50 und ihre Mutter Betty Bowers 32. Sie hatte mit John Killinghall Jr., Esq. mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1471 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Ann Perkinson è nata il nel 1417 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Alexander Parkinson, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Betty Bowers, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con John Killinghall Jr., Esq.. Morì nel 1471, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Ann Perkinsonが1417年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Alexander Parkinsonは50歳，母Betty Bowersは32歳であった。彼女はJohn Killinghall Jr., Esq.との間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1471年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Ann Perkinson(이)가 1417년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Parkinson(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Betty Bowers(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 John Killinghall Jr., Esq.(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Ann Perkinson nasceu em 1417, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Parkinson, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Betty Bowers, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com John Killinghall Jr., Esq.. Ela faleceu em 1471, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Ann Perkinson родилась в 1417 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander Parkinson было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Betty Bowers, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от John Killinghall Jr., Esq. Она умерла в 1471 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Ann Perkinson nació en 1417, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Parkinson, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Betty Bowers, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con John Killinghall Jr., Esq.. Murió en 1471, a la edad de 54 años.
